name: Northwind Traders
description: Northwind Traders - Gourmet food distribution analytics with sales, orders, products, and customer insights

content.name: Northwind Traders
content.description: Northwind Traders is a gourmet food distribution company supplying specialty food products to retailers and restaurants worldwide. Analytics cover 77 products, 91 customers, 9 employees, 29 suppliers, and 830 orders.
